name: ID
description: Primary key and resource URL slug

name: Code
description: Internal grouping or tracking code

name: Title
description: Name of the resource

name: Alternative Title
description: Previous or secondary title

name: Description
description: Summary of the resource

name: Language
description: Language code for the resource

name: Display Note
description: User-facing notes such as warnings or usage tips

name: Creator
description: Person or organization that originally authored the resource

name: Creator ID
description: URI identifying the creator (OCLC FAST)

name: Publisher
description: Entity that made the resource available

name: Provider
description: Institution hosting the resource in an archival repository

name: Resource Class
description: Top-level category

name: Resource Type
description: Secondary category

name: Subject
description: Controlled vocabulary from the library metadata domain

name: Theme
description: Controlled vocabulary from the GIS metadata domain

name: Keyword
description: Free-text terms to improve search

name: Local Collection
description: Subcollection defined by the Publisher or Provider

name: Temporal Coverage
description: Textual description of the time period depicted

name: Date Issued
description: Publication date

name: Index Year
description: Single year used for search

name: Date Range
description: Year range used to power temporal search

name: Spatial Coverage
description: Searchable and selectable place names

name: Bounding Box
description: Spatial extent used for search relevance

name: Geometry
description: Spatial extent displayed on the map and used for map search

name: Centroid
description: Center point of the resource’s bounding box

name: Coordinate Reference System
description: Coordinate reference system of the resource

name: Spatial Resolution in Meters
description: Numeric spatial resolution of a raster dataset

name: Spatial Resolution as Text
description: Human-readable description of spatial resolution

name: Georeferenced
description: Whether a scanned map is georeferenced

name: GeoNames
description: URI for a place name from the GeoNames database

name: Access Rights
description: Whether the resource is openly available or requires authentication

name: Rights
description: Free-text rights, usage, or copyright information

name: License
description: URI identifying a specific license

name: Rights Holder
description: Person or organization that owns or controls rights for this version

name: Suppressed Record
description: Flag that hides the record from public search

name: Deprioritize
description: Flag that lowers a record’s ranking in search results

name: Mediator
description: Institutions that provide authentication for licensed resources

name: Access
description: Links for accessing restricted resources

name: File Size
description: Size of the downloadable file

name: B1G Image
description: Thumbnail displayed in search results

name: Format
description: File format displayed to users

name: Member Of
description: Collection to which the resource belongs

name: Is Part Of
description: Parent item of which this resource is a subset

name: Source
description: Resource from which this item was derived

name: Is Version Of
description: Related item from the same series

name: Replaces
description: Deprecated item superseded by this resource

name: Relation
description: General, unspecified relationship to another item

name: Date Accessioned
description: Date the record was added

name: Date Retired
description: Date the record was removed or unpublished

name: Publication State
description: Whether the record is visible in the geoportal

name: Identifier
description: General-purpose identifier

name: WxS Identifier
description: Identifier used to construct a web service endpoint

name: Tags
description: Administrative keywords for internal tracking

name: Provenance
description: Plain-language summary of how the record was obtained

name: Website Platform
description: Technology platform used by the website

name: Is Harvested
description: Whether the website is actively harvested

name: Last Harvested
description: Date the website was last harvested

name: Endpoint Description
description: Type of API or link used to access the resource

name: Endpoint URL
description: URL from which the resource was harvested

name: Accrual Method
description: Method used to obtain the metadata

name: Accrual Periodicity
description: Frequency at which a website is harvested

name: Harvest Workflow
description: Workflow that produced the record

name: Admin Note
description: Internal notes about status, issues, or enrichment
